Patch Set 1:

As you may see, these changes are related only to documentation.
So they can be merged independently of the test results.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I agree with Krzysztof, these are only documentation changes.
This is simply documentation of this --> https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/113072
Change has been successfully merged by Lukasz Muszkieta
